---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# Wrapping Up Loose Ends

- Some of the areas we have been actively working in, in our commitment to open-science and open-source process of testing the R packages before submitting them to the Bioconductor repository and publishing manuscripts

- However, we realize that although many cytometrist express interest in learning R, few of us are at institutions with existing computational cytometry expertise, and most self-study attempts end in frustration
